overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The character transitions from open sidewalks to a covered underpass and emerges into a large intersection with prominent holographic advertisements and district signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown boulevard with pedestrian walkway

events.description: green sports car speeds past on the left side of the street
character stops at intersection crosswalk then proceeds to cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the neon-lit sidewalk, passing street advertisements and palm trees, then crossing at the intersection

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving past quickly on the street
person in red top walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street against the night sky
large vertical digital billboard displaying american flag pattern
sleek green sports car with glowing accents
blue truck parked along the street curb
tall digital display screen showing rotating advertisements
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit downtown sidewalk lined with palm trees and futuristic buildings. A green sports car speeds past on the left while the character approaches an intersection, stops at the crosswalk, and begins crossing the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: large box truck temporarily blocks the view as it moves slowly ahead
character moves to the right side of the road to walk around the truck

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass, following behind a slow-moving truck in the dimly lit corridor

notable_agents.action: box truck driving slowly ahead in the same direction under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a roof overhead
tall concrete wall with graffiti markings on the right side
large white commercial box truck driving ahead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow covered roadway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The lighting becomes significantly darker and more muted. A large box truck drives slowly ahead, temporarily blocking the view as the character follows behind it through the enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with holographic advertisements and Watson district gateway

events.description: emerges from underpass into open plaza with massive holographic signs visible ahead
vehicle passes through the intersection ahead of the character

agents.ego_description: walking into the open intersection, approaching the large holographic district sign and observing the vibrant neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: person standing near the Heaven's club entrance observing the street

entered.detail: large overhead structure with WATSON signage marking the district entrance
massive purple holographic cat head floating above the street
bright red neon sign for Heaven's club on the building facade
large pink holographic figure playing guitar on building side
yellow and white striped construction barriers along the left side

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by massive holographic advertisements including a prominent purple cat head and the Watson district archway. The Heaven's club neon sign glows red on the right while the character walks toward the center of the plaza, surrounded by futuristic neon-lit architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit downtown sidewalk through a dark urban underpass and into a sprawling holographic plaza. It begins with the character walking past futuristic buildings and palm trees, pausing briefly at a crosswalk as a green sports car speeds past. As the character crosses the street, the scene shifts into a narrow covered roadway beneath a massive concrete overpass where the lighting becomes muted and a slow-moving box truck temporarily obscures the view. The environment then opens up as the character emerges from the corridor into a wide intersection dominated by the Watson district archway and a massive purple cat hologram. Finally, the camera moves toward the center of the plaza, surrounded by glowing red neon signs from Heaven's club and towering futuristic architecture.
